name: e-Builder Construction Program Management API
what_it_does: e-Builder (Trimble) REST API for capital program management software for construction owners. Enables AI agents to manage capital construction project portfolios, track budget and cost data across programs, access document and submittal workflows, retrieve schedule and milestone data, manage contractor and vendor workflows, access inspection and quality data, integrate with financial systems for capital accounting, and provide program-wide analytics across large infrastructure portfolios.
use_cases: Tracking capital program costs and budget variances from financial analytics agents
Managing construction document and submittal workflows from project automation agents
Retrieving program portfolio status for executive reporting from analytics agents
Integrating construction data with financial systems from capital accounting agents
not_for: Contractor-side project management without owner-side capital program focus
Small construction projects without capital program scale
General project management without construction capital budgeting
best_when: A government agency, university, hospital system, or infrastructure owner using e-Builder wants AI agents to automate capital program reporting, cost tracking, document workflows, and portfolio analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Capital construction program data includes large budget commitments and contract data. Unauthorized modifications to budget or contract data can have significant financial consequences.

auth.notes: e-Builder uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with project-level permissions. Trimble Connect integration available. Scopes control project, cost, document, and reporting access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — capital program management enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-program and per-user enterprise pricing; government and education pricing available
pricing.notes: Ft. Lauderdale, Florida. Founded 1995. Acquired by Trimble in 2018. Market leader for owner-side capital program management. Dominant in government, education, healthcare, and infrastructure sectors. Competes with Oracle Aconex and Kahua for owner PM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLA-based

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Capital construction budget and contract data — unauthorized changes are high consequence
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 and API key
Owner-side focus — designed for infrastructure owners, not contractors or architects
Trimble Connect integration adds another auth layer for document management
Government customers may have additional compliance requirements beyond SOC2
FedRAMP availability — verify current authorization status for federal use
agent_readiness.security_notes: Capital construction program and financial data. SOC2, FedRAMP option. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Government and infrastructure owner focus.

security_score_components.security_notes: Capital construction and financial data. SOC2, FedRAMP. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Government infrastructure focus.
